content.query:
SELECT  TOP (100)

emp.EmployeeID as PersonID
,FirstName as EmployeeFirstName
,LastName as EmployeeFirstName
,(FirstName + ' ' + LastName) as EmployeeName
,m1.managerEmployeeID

--Inspector Location
--Location
--Manager Name	
--Manager Name L2	
--Person Number

 FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp

 LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim] m1
 ON m1.EmployeeID = emp.EmployeeID
 AND m1.IsActive = 'Y'

 WHERE emp.IsActive = 'Y'
